Exhibition Room

Irises

From Van Gogh-toned garden beds to the misted borders of Tuscany, the iris recurs across the artist's travels and seasons — bearded, Siberian, wild and cultivated alike.

No. 2-1
Irises, Van Gogh Garden
Nona Dronova · 2023 · Oil on canvas

Nona Dronova · Oil on canvas

Nona Dronova · 2011 · Oil on canvas
No. 2-5

Nona Dronova · 2016 · Oil on canvas
No. 2-6

Nona Dronova · Oil on canvas
No. 2-7

Nona Dronova · Oil on canvas
No. 2-8
Irises on the Vineyards of Tuscany
Nona Dronova · 2017 · Oil on canvas
The Garden as Art

A digital archive of artistic heritage, dedicated to the philosophy of the garden, contemporary art, and the creation of a harmonious living space.
